body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'COMPANY INFORMATION'.

title.desc: A summary of the section, e.g., 'For the record'.

subtitle.desc: The legal name of the company, e.g., 'FundLok Joint Stock Company'.

subtitle_2.desc: The tax code of the company, e.g., '1501167629'.

subtitle_4.desc: The legal representative's name and title, e.g., 'Vuong Vinh Loc· General Director'.

subtitle_5.desc: The office address, e.g., 'SIHUB (Startup & Innovation Hub HCMC)'.

subtitle_6.desc: The office address, e.g., '123 Truong Dinh, Xuan Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam'.
